seoTitle: Goomalibee vs Goongerah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goomalibee and Goongerah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goomalibee and Goongerah.
heading: Goomalibee vs Goongerah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goomalibee, Victoria and Goongerah, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goongerah has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Goomalibee (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goomalibee or Goongerah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goomalibee has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Goongerah scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goomalibee scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Goongerah scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goomalibee or Goongerah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goongerah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
